recommendations.title: Abracadabra
recommendations.overview: A housewife struggles with her husband after he is possessed by a ghost.

recommendations.title: Welcome to Me
recommendations.overview: A year in the life of Alice Klieg, a woman with Borderline personality disorder who wins the Mega Millions lottery, quits her meds and buys her own talk show.

recommendations.title: Tell Me Who I Am
recommendations.overview: In this documentary, Alex trusts his twin, Marcus, to tell him about his past after he loses his memory. But Marcus is hiding a dark family secret.

recommendations.title: Leaving
recommendations.overview: A bourgeois housewife, planning to go back to work as a physiotherapist after having devoted 20 years to her husband and two children, has her comfortable, elegant life turned upside down when she falls for a Spanish builder and begins a runaway affa

recommendations.title: Novocaine
recommendations.overview: A dentist finds himself a murder suspect after a sexy patient seduces him into prescribing her drugs.

recommendations.title: To Leslie
recommendations.overview: A West Texas single mother wins the lottery and squanders it just as fast, leaving behind a world of heartbreak. Years later, with her charm running out and nowhere to go, she fights to rebuild her life and find redemption.

recommendations.title: Tanner Hall
recommendations.overview: A manipulative childhood acquaintance worms her way into a teenager's circle of friends at an all-girls boarding school.

recommendations.title: Gladiator
recommendations.overview: After the death of Emperor Marcus Aurelius, his devious son takes power and demotes Maximus, one of Rome's most capable generals who Marcus preferred. Eventually, Maximus is forced to become a gladiator and battle to the death against other men for t

recommendations.title: Crime Wave
recommendations.overview: Leyre lives a quiet and comfortable life which ends abruptly when an act of rage of her teenage son leads her to protect him by any means necessary.

recommendations.title: National Velvet
